Каждое существо на его пути получает {uip|Damage|000d41d069204fa98ee5394c060f71ab} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}ударного урона{/g} с 30% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}пробития брони{/g}. languages.text: El usuario puede moverse a través de aliados y enemigos por igual. Toda criatura que se interponga en su camino sufre {uip|Damage|000d41d069204fa98ee5394c060f71ab} de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}daño de impacto{/g} con un 30 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}penetración de armadura{/g}. Además, el usuario gana +3 acumulaciones de {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}ventaja táctica{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user can move through allies and enemies. The user also gains +3 stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}.

languages.text: Der Nutzer kann sich durch Gegner und Verbündete bewegen. Jede Kreatur auf seinem Weg erleidet {uip|Damage|000d41d069204fa98ee5394c060f71ab} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}Aufprallschaden{/g} mit 30 % {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}Rüstungsdurchdringung{/g}. Außerdem erhält der Nutzer +3 Stapel {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Taktischer Vorteil{/g}.

languages.text: Kullanıcı, dostların ve düşmanların içinden ilerleyebilir. Yoluna çıkan her yaratık, %30 {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}zırh delme{/g} değerine sahip {uip|Damage|000d41d069204fa98ee5394c060f71ab} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}darbe hasarına{/g} maruz kalır. Kullanıcı ayrıca +3 {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}taktiksel avantaj{/g} birikimi kazanır.

languages.text: L'utilisateur peut traverser alliés comme ennemis. Chaque créature sur sa trajectoire subit {uip|Damage|000d41d069204fa98ee5394c060f71ab} points de {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}dégâts d'impact{/g} avec 30 % de {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}pénétration d'armure{/g}. L'utilisateur gagne également +3 cumuls d'{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Avantage tactique{/g}.
languages.original_text: The user can move through allies and enemies. Each creature on their path suffers {uip|Damage|000d41d069204fa98ee5394c060f71ab} {g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}impact damage{/g} with 30% {g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}armour penetration{/g}. The user also gains +3 stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}.

traits.locale_text: L'utilisateur peut traverser alliés comme ennemis. L'utilisateur gagne également +3 cumuls d'{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}Avantage tactique{/g}.

languages.text: 使用者可穿过盟友和敌人移动。路径上的每个生物承受附带30%{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}护甲穿透{/g}的{uip|Damage|000d41d069204fa98ee5394c060f71ab}点{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}冲击伤害{/g}。使用者同时获得3层{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}战术优势{/g}。

The user also gains +3 stacks of {g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}tactical advantage{/g}.

languages.text: 使用者は味方および敵を通り抜けて移動できる。その経路上の各ユニットは{uip|Damage|000d41d069204fa98ee5394c060f71ab}の{g|Encyclopedia:ImpactDamage}衝撃ダメージ{/g}を30%の{g|Encyclopedia:ArmourPenetration}装甲貫通{/g}で受ける。使用者は{g|f:2606d221cbd84502957939547b6f4d21}戦術的優位{/g}も+3スタック得る。
